questions.question: Describe the fundamental difference between NP-complete problems and NP-hard problems. Provide an example of an NP-complete problem.
Explain the concept of a branching factor in a decision tree. How does it relate to the size of the search space?
A decision tree with a branching factor of 3 is used to solve a problem with 8 possible states. What is the maximum number of possible paths through the tree?
